## Summary

Describe the requested improvement in one or two sentences.

Do not include secrets, tokens, license keys, personal data, customer
identifiers, activation identifiers, private Lemon Squeezy response bodies, or
private logs in public issues.

## Use Case

Describe the app or library integration problem this would solve.

## Package Scope

Explain why this belongs in the Lemon Squeezy provider package instead of
LicenseKit's provider-neutral core, app-specific integration, or a separate
commerce package for offerings, pricing, checkout, or customer portals.

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the API, behavior, or documentation change you want.

## Alternatives Considered

List any app-side workaround, LicenseKit core change, or separate package you
considered.

## Additional Context
